decision_gating_evidence.note: 'thank you for your review you saved me buying this and i purposely waited for you to rate it or review to make a decision' — the review IS the purchase gate; avoided-purchase = decision influence (strongest decision-value class; not a purchase label)
'I wish you had done this review a couple of months ago before I bought it' — review-timing regret, same decision-value
